variants: Imani Brownell was born in Blueridge Junction and has since made a name for herself in the world of literature and innovation. Currently residing in Ravenpine Hall, she authored the critically acclaimed work, Glacier Pulse Lattice. Her contributions in the field have not gone unnoticed, as she received the Limestone Passage Commendation. Imani is a proud member of the Whispergleam Calligraphers Union, where she fosters her passion for calligraphy and artistic expression.
